key_sentences.pinyin: Jīn tiān jǐ yuè jǐ hào?
Jīn tiān sān yuè shí wǔ hào.
Xià wǔ sān diǎn sì shí wǔ fēn

grammar_points.title: Date expressions: Year-Month-Date order
grammar_points.explanation: Chinese dates go from largest to smallest unit: 年(year) → 月(month) → 号(date). This is opposite to British English (15 March 2024) and different from American English (March 15, 2024). Formula: [Year]年(nián) + [Month]月(yuè) + [Date]号(hào)

examples.pinyin: Èr líng èr sì nián liù yuè yī hào
Èr líng èr wǔ nián shí èr yuè sān shí yī hào

exercises.question: Write the correct order: [号, 月, 年]
Say the date: 2024年10月20号
exercises.answer: èr líng èr sì nián shí yuè èr shí hào

exercises.question: What comes first in Chinese dates: month or year?

grammar_points.title: Time expressions with 点 (diǎn) and 分 (fēn)
grammar_points.explanation: 点(diǎn) means 'o'clock' and 分(fēn) means 'minute'. Time format: [Time of day] + [Hour]点 + [Minutes]分. Time of day comes first. Use 半(bàn) for 'half past'.

examples.pinyin: Shàng wǔ shí diǎn èr shí fēn

exercises.question: What does 点 mean in time expressions?
Translate: 9:30 AM
exercises.answer: 上午九点半 or 上午九点三十分

exercises.question: Which comes first: time of day or hour?
exercises.answer: time of day (上午/下午/晚上)

grammar_points.title: Time words: 今天, 明天, 昨天
grammar_points.explanation: These three words describe days relative to today. 今天(jīn tiān) = today, 明天(míng tiān) = tomorrow, 昨天(zuó tiān) = yesterday. They can be used alone or with dates/times.

examples.pinyin: Jīn tiān shì xīng qī yī.

exercises.question: How do you say 'yesterday' in Chinese?

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 明天?

pinyin_focus.topic: Complete pinyin review — initials, finals and tones
